programme.title: Operation Fryday
programme.desc: Police informer Ghulam holds the force responsible when his brother gets killed in a gang war. As he then kick-starts his own business, he wrongfully gets involved in a series of bomb attacks.

programme.title: Main Tera Hero
programme.desc: Seenu and Sunaina fall in love after he saves her from a violent policeman. However, their love story takes a turn when a gangster's daughter wants to marry Seenu.

programme.title: Dil Toh Baccha Hai Ji
programme.desc: Naren Ahuja, Abhay Suri and Milind Kelkar are roommates who embark on a journey to find true love. They find the women of their dreams and try their best to make the women reciprocate their love.

programme.title: Partner
programme.desc: A love expert helps a clumsy man win over his dream girl, only to face unexpected twists when he finds himself entangled in his own complicated romance.

programme.title: The Shaukeens
programme.desc: Bored with their mundane lives, three 60-something men, immersed in the allure of Mauritius, rekindle their youthful spirits and compete for the attention of a vivacious social media addict, Ahana.

programme.title: Sarkar
programme.desc: Subhash Nagre runs a parallel government in the city where he has a cult following. When his enemies plot to murder him, his son takes charge and stands up against them to protect him.

programme.title: Ek Thi Daayan
programme.desc: A famous magician plans to marry his girlfriend. However, he is secretly scarred by persistent hallucinations of his dead sister and is forced to seek psychiatric help.

programme.title: Prassthanam
programme.desc: When Baldev Pratap Singh, a politician, chooses his stepson as his heir, his biological son feels betrayed. Resultantly, violence ensues where blood is spilt and relations are forgotten.

programme.title: Kabir Singh
programme.desc: A genius but short-tempered surgeon falls madly in love with a girl. However, he begins to self-destruct after the girl's father marries her off to another.

programme.title: Pink
programme.desc: After being molested, Minal, along with her friends, tries to file an FIR against a politician's nephew. When the subsequent case gets rigged, Deepak, a retired lawyer, helps them to fight the case.

programme.title: Dark Chocolate
programme.desc: This thriller murder mystery is an adaptation of the real life murder case of Sheena Bora. The discovery of a charred corpse in the woods, leads to a high-profile murder investigation.

programme.title: Salaam E Ishq: A Tribute to Love
programme.desc: According to a famous author, love is not always easy, but it is worth the struggle. Exemplifying this sentiment, six couples burn some bridges and bridge some distances to find their happiness.
